subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God and my Beloved! I beseech Thee by Thy Name through which, when summoned to the heavens, illumination shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی و محبوبی اسئلک باسمک الذی دعوته الی السماء اشرقت عن
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
